title: eval_exists_test creates needless tmp vec
description: eval_exists_test creates a local tmp: Vec<&Form> = forms.iter().collect() solely to pass to collect_one_string_list, which itself accepts &[&Form]. This is a two-step allocation that exists only because collect_one_string_list takes &[&Form] rather than an iterator or &[Form]. Suggested rewrite: change collect_one_string_list to accept &[Form] directly (matching how the other test functions work after extract_match_type returns Vec<&Form>), eliminating the tmp binding.
